description: §40.1.1 — an auth gate whose redirect target (default `/login`) does not match any page URL pattern in the route map fires the per-gate I-AUTH-REDIRECT-UNRESOLVED (info). The quiet per-gate companion to the tier-2 W-AUTH-LOGIN-MISSING structural warning.
rationale: §40.1.1: for each gate that names a redirect, if the target is absent from RouteMap.pages' URL patterns the analyzer emits I-AUTH-REDIRECT-UNRESOLVED at info severity (per-gate), pointing at `scrml generate auth`. The default `/login` redirect with no authored login page is the canonical trigger.
